channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump says he's considering ways to serve a third term as president
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President Donald Trump said Sunday that “I’m not joking” about trying to serve a third term, the clearest indication he is considering ways to breach a constitutional barrier against continuing to lead the country after his second term ends at the beginning of 2029.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Iran has rejected direct negotiations with the US in response to Trump's letter
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Iran's president said Sunday that the Islamic Republic rejected direct negotiations with the United States over its rapidly advancing nuclear program, offering Tehran's first response to a letter that U.S.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL and AMIR VAHDAT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's promised 'Liberation Day' of tariffs is coming. Here's what it could mean for you
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump says Wednesday will be “Liberation Day" — a moment when he plans to roll out a set of tariffs that he promises will free the United States from foreign goods. The details of Trump's next round of import taxes are still sketchy.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Energy chief envisions US nuclear renaissance: restoring ‘pit’ production, localizing nuke power
item.description: Plutonium 'pits' and Small Modular Reactors are all part of Energy Secretary Chris Wright's early goals for his department.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrats reject advice to 'play dead,' vow hard fight against Trump’s domestic agenda
item.description: A month ago, James Carville, the highly influential Democratic strategist, advised his party to “play dead” and allow President Trump and his Republican allies who control Congress to self-destruct under the weight of unpopular policies. House Democrats are rejecting the strategy outright.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Trump admin’s Signal leak shows ‘profound’ risk of uncontrolled communications: former intelligence official
item.description: Sue Gordon, former principal deputy national intelligence director, said the Trump administration needs to deal with any "persistent risk" to communications following the Signal chat leak.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump unloads on Judge Boasberg, 'radical left judges' for halting deportations of violent illegal aliens
item.description: President Donald Trump slammed DC federal Judge James Boasberg and "other radical left judges" for preventing the deportation of violent illegal immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk hands out $1 million payments after Wisconsin Supreme Court declines request to stop him
item.description: Elon Musk has given out $1 million checks to two Wisconsin voters, declaring them spokespeople for his political group.
item.dc:creator: Scott Bauer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Democrats ramp up town halls in GOP districts
item.description: House Democrats are ramping up their aggressive strategy of conducting town halls in Republican-held districts, vying to exploit the GOP’s advised moratorium on the events to make inroads with frustrated voters, pick up battleground seats, and flip control of the House in next year’s midterms.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: A weekend ritual for Trump's Florida die-hards to get a brief glimpse of their political hero
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The sun was shining outside President Donald Trump's West Palm Beach golf course on Saturday morning when Alan Mentser got a call letting him know that police were shutting down a road nearby. It was almost time to “show the boss a little love.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tesla Takedown: Anti-Musk protesters mobilize for Global Day of Protest at hundreds of Tesla locations
item.description: A Global Day of Protest has been planned for Saturday, during which anti-Musk protesters plan to demonstrate at hundreds of Tesla showroom locations across the globe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Critics see Trump attacks on the 'Black Smithsonian' as an effort to sanitize racism in US history
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — President Donald Trump's order accusing the Smithsonian Institution of not reflecting American history notes correctly that the country's Founding Fathers declared that “all men are created equal.” But it doesn't mention that the founders enshrined slavery into the U.S.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump releases powerful video highlighting US-Greenland bond after deadly Nazi attack
item.description: President Donald Trump posted a powerful video Friday highlighting the strong historical bonds between Greenland and the United States amid ongoing efforts to annex the nation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top vaccine official allegedly pushed out of FDA: report
item.description: Dr. Peter Marks, who played a key role in Operation Warp Speed, was reportedly forced out of the FDA, according to the Wall Street Journal. In his purported resignation letter, Marks slams HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Signal chat shows isolationist Vance as Trump flexes control abroad
item.description: The war plans group chat uncovered by a journalist at The Atlantic exposed some daylight between Vice President Vance and others in the administration.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota food shelves worried as USDA cancels truckloads of food
item.description: This week, the U.S. Department of Agriculture canceled almost half of food shelf orders from Minnesota farmers under the federal Commodity Credit Corporation. Organizations providing nutrition programs say they are concerned about how to provide for their clientele.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News

item.title: Republican lawmaker confronted over Signal chat leak, responds sharply
item.description: Rep. Tim Burchett, R-Tenn., had a harsh response to a man asking him about his trust in the Trump team after the Signal chat leak. The congressman's reply seemed to stop the man in his tracks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk says 'civilization will disappear' unless birth rates change
item.description: "The birth rate is very low in almost every country, and unless that changes, civilization will disappear," Musk said in an interview with Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Vance accuses Denmark of underinvesting in Greenland as Trump presses for US takeover of the island
item.description: NUUK, Greenland (AP) — U.S. Vice President JD Vance said Friday that Denmark has "underinvested" in Greenland’s security and demanded that Denmark change its approach as President Donald Trump pushes to take over the Danish territory. The pointed remarks came as Vance visited U.S.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP CROWTHER, KIRSTEN GRIESHABER and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Lake Nation leader condemns Trump orders during State of the Band Address
item.description: During the Red Lake Nation State of the Band Address Friday, chair Darrell Seki Jr., condemned President Donald Trump’s recent executive orders, saying they have created a crisis throughout Indian Country.
item.dc:creator: Mathew Holding Eagle III, MPR News

item.title: Withdrawal of Stefanik UN nod puts spotlight on slim House margin
item.description: The withdrawal of Rep. Elise Stefanik’s (R-N.Y.) nomination to be U.S. ambassador to the United Nations is putting a spotlight on the House GOP’s razor-thin majority and the anxiety about upcoming special elections to replace President Trump’s Cabinet picks.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top Minnesota election official says Trump is attempting ‘unlawful’ power grab
item.description: Minnesota Secretary of State Steve Simon said President Donald Trump’s recent executive order targeting elections was “unlawful.
item.dc:creator: Tom Crann and Lukas Levin, MPR News

item.title: McConnell: US headed for ‘Russia wins, America loses’ headline on Ukraine deal
item.description: Former Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.) warned in a speech Thursday that U.S. negotiators trying to end the war in Ukraine are headed for a “Russia wins, America loses” headline if they agree to a deal that achieves only “illusory peace.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota Supreme Court allows recently incarcerated to serve on juries
item.description: Minnesotans who are on probation or supervised release for felony convictions will soon be allowed to serve on juries, following a recent decision by the Minnesota Supreme Court.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: NYC mayoral poll: Cuomo grows lead, Mamdani gains traction
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is still holding onto the lead in the New York City mayoral race – but one other candidate is also gaining support, according to new exclusive polling conducted by PIX11 News in partnership with Emerson College and The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Grace Gomez, PIX 11

item.title: Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo talks possible Medicaid cuts, education, movie studios
item.description: Republican Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo said he may have to call a special session later in the year to handle possible cuts from the federal government that directly impact the state budget.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Florida Democrats continue to push for Medicaid expansion
item.description: Amid fears of federal cuts, the battle continues at the statehouse as Florida Democrats continue to push the GOP super majority to consider expanding Medicaid.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms relationship with Vanessa Trump
item.description: “Love is in the air and life is better with you by my side! We look forward to our journey through life together,” Woods said on X, where he has 6.4 million followers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
